parameters.content:
## Dependency & API Deprecation Watcher

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Set DEPRECATION_EMAIL_TO
3. Configure dependencies list and API contracts to watch
4. Code nodes check npm outdated + detect sunset headers — no LLM required
5. Approval gate before deprecation warnings are sent to engineering

parameters.subject: =APPROVAL REQUIRED: Dependency Warnings — {{ $json.meta.critical }} critical, {{ $json.meta.warning }} warnings
parameters.message:
=
{{ $json.report_text }}

Approve and send to engineering | Reject
